ㅤ

Still kinda struggling with his character so sorry if he's a bit ooc 😩

I've spoken about this before (and probably multiple times after that) but one of my BIGGEST AI pet peeves is how I can't talk or narrate too much for {{user}} in the intro 😭

It makes writing dialogue so much harder and has literally made certain scenarios impossible to write (or I've had to seriously water them down). It's so mf annoying LIKE UGHHHH I JUST WANNA WRITE HOW I WANT 😩

Like I would loveee to make a short banter somewhere in my intros but it literally can't happen cause the AI is an idiot 🙄 this intro was supposed to be longer but it's kinda hard to negotiate a deal without two people talking or at least doing actions...

It's so frustrating OH MY LORDDDDDD.

moving on,

Still semi-hiatus, idk when it’s gonna consider I highkey start school again next week 😩

I am not ready for assignments again, I literally hate that shit.

anyways,

Enjoy!

Love,

Mama Down

ㅤ
